summary: PR #2363 primarily added decompilation progress for src/melee/mn/mnnamenew.c, with bot-reported 5 new matched mnnamenew functions and 20 additional improvements in the same unit. The slice also shows broad cleanup and supporting edits across headers, symbol metadata, sislib typing, and formatting/style changes in nearby or dependent files.

key_files.role: Primary decomp target; largest change in PR with 1706 additions and bot-reported new matches and improvements for main/melee/mn/mnnamenew.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: decomp-dev bot report lists 5 new matches and 20 improvements in main/melee/mn/mnnamenew

key_files.role: Menu type definitions updated to support mnnamenew work.
Symbol metadata updated for mnNameNew data/string symbols, replacing one lbl_803EE35C range with multiple mnNameNew_803EE35C..mnNameNew_803EE708 string symbols.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: config/GALE01/symbols.txt hunk replaces lbl_803EE35C size 0x3C4 with multiple mnNameNew_* data:string symbols

key_files.role: SisLib prototype surface changed, likely related to typed call cleanup shown in gmresult.c.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmresult.c removes casts on HSD_SisLib_803A74F0 color-pointer arguments

key_files.role: Call-site cleanup for HSD_SisLib_803A74F0 removes repeated u8* casts.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmresult.c changes HSD_SisLib_803A74F0(..., (u8*) &sp2C) to HSD_SisLib_803A74F0(..., &sp2C) and similar call sites

key_files.role: Large supporting cleanup in ground/castle code, mostly formatting, initializer style, pointer style, and local expression formatting in shown excerpt.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grcastle.c rewrites aggregate initializers, for-loop spacing, pointer declarations, and line wrapping
raw_diff: ft_0D31.c moves lb/lbvector.h include and wraps fewer call arguments

what_changed: Added substantial source for src/melee/mn/mnnamenew.c, with CI/bot report showing +1712 matched-code bytes and 5 newly matched mnnamenew items: mnNameNew_8023BAA8, fn_8023CFC8, mnNameNew_8023B0F8, mnNameNew_8023B314, and InitNameEntryUIState.

Improved many still-unmatched mnnamenew items according to the bot report, including mnNameNew_MainInput, mnNameNew_KeySetup, mnNameNew_GlyphVariantSetup, fn_8023DBE8, mnNameNew_EnterFromMnCharSel, PickAutoName, WriteCharactersForNameAtIndex, AddCharacterToName, and NameContainsOnlySpaces.
Updated mnNameNew data symbol metadata in config/GALE01/symbols.txt by replacing a broad lbl_803EE35C object with many scoped mnNameNew_* data:string symbols plus existing trailing data symbols.
Touched menu headers and types: src/melee/mn/mnnamenew.h, src/melee/mn/mnmain.h, and src/melee/mn/types.h.
Removed explicit u8* casts at HSD_SisLib_803A74F0 call sites in gmresult.c, while sislib.c and sislib.h were also changed.
Applied broad cleanup/formatting edits across many small files, including grcastle.c, ft_0D31.c, item files, lb files, mnname.c, mndatadel.c, mnmainrule.c, toy.c, and sislib files.

smart_moves.text: The PR included symbol metadata updates for mnNameNew data/string ranges alongside the mnnamenew source work, which likely made data references more explicit for the decomp attempt.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt splits lbl_803EE35C into mnNameNew_* data:string entries
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report shows mnnamenew .data improved from 0.00% to 29.81%

smart_moves.text: The call-site cleanup around HSD_SisLib_803A74F0 shows a type-oriented cleanup pattern: adjust the typed API surface so callers pass color pointers directly instead of casting to u8*.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmresult.c removes repeated (u8*) casts at HSD_SisLib_803A74F0 call sites
changed_files.jsonl: sislib.h and sislib.c both changed

smart_moves.text: The bot report provided a narrow progress ledger naming exactly which mnnamenew symbols became matched and which improved, rather than claiming the whole translation unit matched.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: decomp-dev bot report lists 5 new matches and 20 improvements in unmatched items

decomp_lessons.lesson: For large menu decomp PRs, keep the progress claim symbol-specific: the evidence supports several exact mnnamenew function matches and many partial improvements, not a complete mnnamenew TU match.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: 5 new matches and 20 improvements reported for main/melee/mn/mnnamenew

decomp_lessons.lesson: When repeated call sites need casts only because an API is under-typed, updating the owned prototype can let callers use typed local objects directly.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gmresult.c removes (u8*) casts from HSD_SisLib_803A74F0 calls
changed_files.jsonl: sislib.h changed 1 line and sislib.c changed 4 lines

decomp_lessons.lesson: Data/string symbol metadata can be part of matching work, but this PR evidence only supports that the mnNameNew data symbols were changed and that .data score improved; it does not by itself establish a global rule to split all string clusters into exported symbols.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt replaces lbl_803EE35C with multiple mnNameNew_* data:string symbols
text_corpus.jsonl: bot report shows mnnamenew .data improvement

naming_conventions.convention: mnnamenew data symbols in this PR use the mnNameNew_XXXXXXXX address-style prefix for data/string symbols.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt added mnNameNew_803EE35C through mnNameNew_803EE708 data:string entries

naming_conventions.convention: Recovered or improved mnnamenew function names include semantic local names when supported by the PR branch/report, while some address-style names remain.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report lists these mnnamenew items as matched or improved

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use bot/checkdiff-style reporting to separate fully matched functions from partial score improvements in a large decomp PR.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: Report for GALE01 lists matched code +1712 bytes, 5 new matches, and 20 improvements

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Remove unnecessary casts after aligning a callee signature; in the shown call sites, HSD_SisLib_803A74F0 receives stack color objects via their typed address rather than via u8* casts.
Support mnnamenew matching with symbol metadata edits for known data/string addresses, but keep the evidence tied to the affected TU and reported .data improvement.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Report for GALE01 shows matched code 61.33% (+0.04%, +1712 bytes), 5 new mnnamenew matches, and 20 improvements in unmatched mnnamenew items.
No human review comments or review records are present in the loaded PR slice.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, state, author, changed-file counts
human_pr_text.md: PR body only says Tracking PR as usual
raw_diff: truncated diff excerpt but includes symbols.txt, ft_0D31.c, gmresult.c, and grcastle.c portions
text_corpus.jsonl: PR body and decomp-dev bot report
notes: The PR body contains almost no technical explanation.
The raw diff is truncated in the loaded slice; many changed files are known only by metadata, not inspected hunks.
The bot report is strong evidence for named match/improvement results, but no manual validation notes or human reviewer intent are present.
Do not infer that all formatting-only-looking cleanup was required for matching; the slice only shows the edits, not the author's rationale.
The symbol metadata changes are real in the diff, but the slice does not prove a general naming/data ownership policy beyond this PR.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Keep large decomp progress claims symbol-specific
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2363 is a useful example where the bot report supports exact claims: 5 new matched mnnamenew functions and 20 improved unmatched mnnamenew items, not a blanket TU match.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed prototype cleanup can eliminate repeated call-site casts
accepted_candidate_records.text: The gmresult.c diff removes repeated (u8*) casts at HSD_SisLib_803A74F0 call sites while sislib.h/sislib.c are changed, suggesting a narrow typed API cleanup pattern.

source_update_candidates.title: mnnamenew PR touched menu source, headers, types, and mnNameNew symbol metadata
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2363 centered on src/melee/mn/mnnamenew.c and also changed src/melee/mn/mnnamenew.h, src/melee/mn/mnmain.h, src/melee/mn/types.h, and config/GALE01/symbols.txt. Bot report lists 5 new mnnamenew matches and 20 mnnamenew improvements.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path-scoped historical fact for future mnnamenew decomp work.

source_update_candidates.title: mnNameNew data symbols split from lbl_803EE35C in PR #2363
source_update_candidates.text: The symbols.txt hunk replaces lbl_803EE35C size 0x3C4 with multiple mnNameNew_803EE35C through mnNameNew_803EE708 data:string symbols, followed by existing mnNameNew_803EE720 and mnNameNew_803EE724 entries.
source_update_candidates.reason: Could help future data/symbol lookup, but should be curated as path metadata rather than a global standard.

source_update_candidates.title: Check SisLib color argument type history around HSD_SisLib_803A74F0
source_update_candidates.text: The loaded diff shows gmresult.c removing u8* casts when passing local color variables to HSD_SisLib_803A74F0, while sislib.h and sislib.c changed. Curator may inspect full diff/current source to decide whether this is a stable API typing fact.
source_update_candidates.reason: Loaded evidence suggests typed signature cleanup but does not include the sislib.h hunk text.

rejection_notes: Do not promote a global rule that string clusters should be split into global data:string symbols; this PR only shows mnNameNew symbol metadata edits and a bot-reported .data improvement.
Do not claim the entire mnnamenew translation unit matched; the bot report identifies only 5 new full matches plus partial improvements.
Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale because the loaded slice has no human review comments.
Do not treat grcastle.c formatting and local cleanup as a matching tactic without full diff/build evidence; the excerpt mainly shows formatting, initializer style, pointer spacing, and line wrapping.
